chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-661 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.03.2022 Mr. Anwar H. Memon advocate for petitioners. ----- The question involved in this petition was addressed in C.Ps. No.D- 868, 879, 890, 908, 985, 994, 998, 1012, 1019, 1024, 1046 & 1054 of 2022, which were dismissed on the count of laches on 29.03.2022. However, today when this petition was taken up the petitioners’ counsel has filed a statement that on account of some mistakes they are withdrawing this petition and permission be granted to file a fresh. We are afraid that although such mistakes could be rectified we are not inclined to give such permission to file fresh petition, the petition, however, is dismissed along with pending application in view of the order passed in C.Ps. No.D-868, 879, 890, 908, 985, 994, 998, 1012, 1019, 1024, 1046 & 1054 of 2022,dated 29.03.2022. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
